description: OAuth refactor with docs guide update - auth domain mixed with UI components
rationale: Call-graph analysis: docs auth guide files, OAuthApp*.tsx UI components, and supporting utilities form 3+ disconnected components. Documentation markdown files have no call-graph edges to TSX components = ERROR.
notes: Previously warning (auth+ui = 2 domains). Call-graph analysis identifies 3+ disconnected clusters: docs files, UI components, and any supporting files without shared import chains.
